title: Toward a Sample Metadata Standard in Public Proteomics Repositories.
author: Perez-Riverol Y European Bioinformatics Community for Mass Spectrometry
content: S-EPMC7116434 PMC7116434 Toward a Sample Metadata Standard in Public Proteomics Repositories. Metadata is essential in proteomics data repositories and is crucial to interpret and reanalyze the deposited data sets. For every proteomics data set, we should capture at least three levels of metadata
